label: Tend duration comp
description: Tracks tending state and duration for this hediff.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

baseTendDuration.label: Base tend duration
baseTendDuration.description: Base duration in ticks that tending lasts.

tendOverlapDays.label: Tend overlap days
tendOverlapDays.description: Overlap in days before tending expires.

severityPerDayTended.label: Severity per day (tended)
severityPerDayTended.description: Severity change per day when tended.

severityPerDayNotTended.label: Severity per day (not tended)
severityPerDayNotTended.description: Severity change per day when not tended.

disappearsAtTotalTendQuality.label: Disappears at total tend quality
disappearsAtTotalTendQuality.description: Total tend quality at which hediff disappears. -1 to disable.

repairOnTend.label: Repair on tend
repairOnTend.description: If true, the body part is repaired when tended.

allTreatmentQualityLevel.label: All treatment quality level
allTreatmentQualityLevel.description: Override tend quality level for all treatments.
